Class FhirProcedureTools

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirProcedureTools
public class FhirProcedureTools extends Object

    static List<MiiProcedure>
    filterProceduresByRecordDate(List<MiiProcedure> ukbProcedures, Date referenceDate)
    Filters procedures to include only those that were performed after the provided reference date.
    static Set<String>
    getEncounterIdsBySnomedCodes(Collection<MiiProcedure> ukbProcedures, String snomedCodes)
    Returns the set of encounter (case) IDs for which at least one MiiProcedure carries a coding with system SNOMED and the given SNOMED CT code.

    Returns all procedures whose OPS code starts with the given prefix.

    Checks whether a given MiiProcedure contains any coding whose system equals OPS and whose code is contained in the provided collection of SNOMED CT codes.

    Checks whether the given MiiProcedure contains at least one OPS coding whose code starts with the specified OPS code prefix.
    static boolean

    Checks whether a given MiiProcedure contains any coding whose system equals SNOMED and whose code is contained in the provided collection of SNOMED CT codes.

  • Constructor Details

    • FhirProcedureTools

      public FhirProcedureTools()

  • Method Details

    • getEncounterIdsBySnomedCodes

      public static Set<String> getEncounterIdsBySnomedCodes(Collection<MiiProcedure> ukbProcedures, String snomedCodes)
      Returns the set of encounter (case) IDs for which at least one MiiProcedure carries a coding with system SNOMED and the given SNOMED CT code.
      Parameters:
      ukbProcedures - the procedures to inspect; may be null
      snomedCodes - the SNOMED CT code to match (single code); must not be null for reliable results
      Returns:
      a Set of encounter IDs (case IDs) that have at least one matching procedure; never null

    • isSnomedCodeInProcedure

      public static boolean isSnomedCodeInProcedure(MiiProcedure procedure, Collection<String> snomedCodes)
      Checks whether a given MiiProcedure contains any coding whose system equals SNOMED and whose code is contained in the provided collection of SNOMED CT codes.
      Parameters:
      procedure - the procedure to inspect; may be null
      snomedCodes - collection of SNOMED CT codes to look for; may be null or empty
      Returns:
      true if a SNOMED coding with a code in snomedCodes is present; otherwise false

    • isOpsCodeInProcedure

      public static boolean isOpsCodeInProcedure(MiiProcedure procedure, Collection<String> opsCodes)
      Checks whether a given MiiProcedure contains any coding whose system equals OPS and whose code is contained in the provided collection of SNOMED CT codes.
      Parameters:
      procedure - the procedure to inspect; may be null
      opsCodes - collection of OPS codes to look for; may be null or empty
      Returns:
      true if a OPS coding with a code in snomedCodes is present; otherwise false

    • isOpsCodePrefixInProcedure

      public static boolean isOpsCodePrefixInProcedure(MiiProcedure procedure, String opsCodePrefix)
      Checks whether the given MiiProcedure contains at least one OPS coding whose code starts with the specified OPS code prefix.
      Parameters:
      procedure - the MiiProcedure to check; may be null
      opsCodePrefix - the OPS code prefix to look for; may be null or empty
      Returns:
      true if the procedure contains an OPS coding whose code starts with the specified prefix; false otherwise (including if inputs are null or empty)

    • getProceduresByOpsCodePrefix

      public static Set<MiiProcedure> getProceduresByOpsCodePrefix(Collection<MiiProcedure> ukbProcedures, String opsCodePrefix)
      Returns all procedures whose OPS code starts with the given prefix.
      Parameters:
      ukbProcedures - the procedures to filter; may be null
      opsCodePrefix - the OPS code prefix; may be null or empty
      Returns:
      a set of procedures whose OPS coding starts with the prefix; empty if inputs invalid

    • getProceduresByAnyOpsCodePrefix

      public static Set<MiiProcedure> getProceduresByAnyOpsCodePrefix(Collection<MiiProcedure> ukbProcedures, Collection<String> opsCodePrefixes)
      Returns all procedures that match ANY of the provided OPS code prefixes.
      Parameters:
      ukbProcedures - the procedures to filter; may be null
      opsCodePrefixes - the collection of OPS code prefixes; may be null or empty
      Returns:
      a set of procedures with at least one OPS coding starting with any given prefix

    • filterProceduresByRecordDate

      public static List<MiiProcedure> filterProceduresByRecordDate(List<MiiProcedure> ukbProcedures, Date referenceDate)
      Filters procedures to include only those that were performed after the provided reference date.

      Uses isAfterReference(Procedure, Date) for comparison logic.

      Parameters:
      ukbProcedures - the list of procedures; may be null
      referenceDate - the cutoff date; must not be null
      Returns:
      list of procedures performed after the reference date; never null
